preconditions.name: documentStatus
preconditions.description: Order must be in Draft (DR) or In Progress (IP) status

steps.name: validateMandatoryFields
steps.description: Verify all mandatory header fields are filled: businessPartner, warehouse, orderDate, priceList

behavioral.errorMessage: Mandatory header fields must be completed before booking the order

steps.name: validateOrderLines
steps.description: Verify at least one order line exists with product and quantity greater than zero

behavioral.errorMessage: Order must have at least one line with a valid product and quantity

steps.name: setDocumentStatus
steps.description: Update order document status to Booked (CO)

edgeCases.name: orderAlreadyBooked
edgeCases.description: Booking an already-booked order must abort with a clear message
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts at precondition check with: Order is already booked

edgeCases.name: missingMandatoryFields
edgeCases.description: Booking without a price list or warehouse must fail validation
edgeCases.precondition: priceList IS NULL OR warehouse IS NULL
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 1 validation fails; order remains in Draft status

edgeCases.name: noOrderLines
edgeCases.description: Booking with zero order lines must be rejected
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 2 validation fails with: Order must have at least one line

preconditions.name: documentStatus
preconditions.description: Order must be in Booked (CO) status to be voided

steps.name: validateNotReceived
steps.description: Verify no goods receipt has been generated from this order

behavioral.errorMessage: Cannot void an order that has already been received

steps.name: setDocumentStatusVoided
steps.description: Update order document status to Voided (VO)

edgeCases.name: orderNotBooked
edgeCases.description: Voiding a Draft order must be rejected at the precondition check
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts with: Order must be booked before it can be voided

edgeCases.name: orderWithReceipt
edgeCases.description: Voiding an order that has a posted goods receipt must be blocked
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Step 1 validation fails; order remains in Booked status

edgeCases.name: alreadyVoided
edgeCases.description: Attempting to void an already-voided order must be rejected at precondition
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts at precondition check with: Order is already voided

preconditions.name: documentStatus
preconditions.description: Order must be in Booked (CO) status to be closed

steps.name: setDocumentStatusClosed
steps.description: Update order document status to Closed (CL)

edgeCases.name: orderNotBooked
edgeCases.description: Closing a Draft order must be rejected at the precondition check
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts with: Order must be booked before it can be closed

edgeCases.name: alreadyClosed
edgeCases.description: Closing an already-closed order must be rejected
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Process aborts at precondition check with: Order is already closed
